conference.name: Society for Financial Studies Cavalcade North America

extras.venue: Darden Graduate School of Business, University of Virginia
extras.description: Premier academic finance conference covering all areas of finance. First North American edition.

scrape_metadata.notes: Converted from SFS archive: 144 track sessions, 144 papers, 414 participants.
